world.name: Kretos
world.description: A fractured world born from the remnants of a cosmic war between primordial forces. Magic, technology, and divine will coexist in uneasy balance.

cosmology.sundering: Millennia ago, a catastrophic imbalance nearly destroyed Kretos. The Primordial Deity of Life and Death intervened, sealing the rifts.

kingdoms.name: Aethelgard
kingdoms.description: Mountainous, forested, steeped in divine magic. Home to angels, elves, and holy orders.

kingdoms.name: Nyxara
kingdoms.description: Land of eternal twilight, haunted forests, subterranean labyrinths. Strongholds of vampires, necromancers, shadow creatures.

kingdoms.name: Flamma
kingdoms.description: Volcanic islands, deserts, sun-scorched plains. Birthplace of fire spirits, phoenixes, sun-worshipping empires.

kingdoms.name: Glaciar
kingdoms.description: Endless tundra, ice-capped peaks, frozen sea of Niflheim. Realm of frost giants, ice wraiths, eternal winter.

kingdoms.name: Mekhanika
kingdoms.description: Sprawling urban landscape where magic meets technology. Steam, cybernetics, alchemy define this region.

kingdoms.name: The Wild Zones
kingdoms.description: Vast untamed lands—jungles, deserts, ancient forests—where dinosaurs roam, beasts dwell, hermits train.

factions.name: Celestial Order
factions.description: Preserve order, enforce divine law, protect against chaos.

factions.name: Shadow Accord
factions.description: Embrace chaos, freedom, power of darkness.

factions.name: Unaffiliated
factions.description: Act independently; often caught between factions.

classes.name: Warrior
classes.description: Masters of melee combat, high strength and defense.

classes.name: Mage
classes.description: Wielders of arcane and elemental forces.
